'''tojajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabbagelike|cabbagelike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-j-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabbagelike|cabbagelike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tojajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tojajithi|tojajithi]] || [[word:tojajiji|tojajiji]] || [[word:tojajishi|tojajishi]] || [[word:tojajiki|tojajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tojajuthuthu|tojajuthuthu]] || [[word:tojajujuju|tojajujuju]] || [[word:tojajushushu|tojajushushu]] || [[word:tojajukuku|tojajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tojajuthu|tojajuthu]] || [[word:tojajuju|tojajuju]] || [[word:tojajushu|tojajushu]] || [[word:tojajuku|tojajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tojajufthuf|tojajufthuf]] || [[word:tojajufjuf|tojajufjuf]] || [[word:tojajufshuf|tojajufshuf]] || [[word:tojajufkuf|tojajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tojajethe|tojajethe]] || [[word:tojajeje|tojajeje]] || [[word:tojajeshe|tojajeshe]] || [[word:tojajeke|tojajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tojajothotho|tojajothotho]] || [[word:tojajojojo|tojajojojo]] || [[word:tojajoshosho|tojajoshosho]] || [[word:tojajokoko|tojajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tojajotho|tojajotho]] || [[word:tojajojo|tojajojo]] || [[word:tojajosho|tojajosho]] || [[word:tojajoko|tojajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tojajofthof|tojajofthof]] || [[word:tojajofjof|tojajofjof]] || [[word:tojajofshof|tojajofshof]] || [[word:tojajofkof|tojajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:tojajĂŻfthĂŻf|tojajĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:tojajĂŻfjĂŻf|tojajĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:tojajĂŻfshĂŻf|tojajĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:tojajĂŻfkĂŻf|tojajĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:tojajĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|tojajĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:tojajĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|tojajĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:tojajĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|tojajĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:tojajĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|tojajĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:tojajĂŻfthĂŻf|tojajĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:tojajĂŻfjĂŻf|tojajĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:tojajĂŻfshĂŻf|tojajĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:tojajĂŻfkĂŻf|tojajĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:tojajĂŻfthĂŻf|tojajĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:tojajĂŻfjĂŻf|tojajĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:tojajĂŻfshĂŻf|tojajĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:tojajĂŻfkĂŻf|tojajĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tojajĂŠthĂŠ|tojajĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:tojajĂŠjĂŠ|tojajĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:tojajĂŠshĂŠ|tojajĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:tojajĂŠkĂŠ|tojajĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tojajathatha|tojajathatha]] || [[word:tojajajaja|tojajajaja]] || [[word:tojajashasha|tojajashasha]] || [[word:tojajakaka|tojajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tojajatha|tojajatha]] || [[word:tojajaja|tojajaja]] || [[word:tojajasha|tojajasha]] || [[word:tojajaka|tojajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tojajafthaf|tojajafthaf]] || [[word:tojajafjaf|tojajafjaf]] || [[word:tojajafshaf|tojajafshaf]] || [[word:tojajafkaf|tojajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:tojajasha|tojajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:tojajshĂ«sha|tojajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tojajrosha|tojajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tojajmusha|tojajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:tojajyasha|tojajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotojajnkshĂ«sha|gotojajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotojajnkrosha|gotojajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotojajnkmusha|gotojajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotojajnkyasha|gotojajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:tojajajasha|tojajajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tojajajshĂ«sha|tojajajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tojajajrosha|tojajajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tojajajmusha|tojajajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tojajajyasha|tojajajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotojajajnkshĂ«sha|gotojajajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotojajajnkrosha|gotojajajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotojajajnkmusha|gotojajajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotojajajnkyasha|gotojajajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:tejĂŠjasha|tejĂŠjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tejĂŠjshĂ«sha|tejĂŠjshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tejĂŠjrosha|tejĂŠjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tejĂŠjmusha|tejĂŠjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tejĂŠjyasha|tejĂŠjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotejĂŠjnkshĂ«sha|gotejĂŠjnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotejĂŠjnkrosha|gotejĂŠjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotejĂŠjnkmusha|gotejĂŠjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotejĂŠjnkyasha|gotejĂŠjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:tojfajasha|tojfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tojfajshĂ«sha|tojfajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tojfajrosha|tojfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tojfajmusha|tojfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tojfajyasha|tojfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotojfajnkshĂ«sha|gotojfajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotojfajnkrosha|gotojfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotojfajnkmusha|gotojfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotojfajnkyasha|gotojfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
